title: Wynn Arachnophobia
description: A resource pack for those with arachnophobia but still want to play Wynncraft
body:
### Always download the **latest** version, not the one with the most downloads. 
This pack is for anyone who may not like the look of how detailed the new spider models are. This does not change vanilla spider textures.


- **Funny Spider Faces** - Changes the faces to be less detailed and have a smiley face
  
- **No Spider Legs** - Same as the one above along with removing their legs so they are just floating bodies
  
- **No Spiders** - Removes the texture entirely leaving just the nametag which could be annoying when attacking them but most effective


To use it you must download a mod like [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) so you can put this modified pack on top of the original one once you join the game (I noticed that it's better to load it in before you join and then in /class you can move it to the top; this pack changes nothing in vanilla minecraft so it should be okay to have on all the time).
